parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('org_id', org_id, 'slug', slug, 'name', name, 'description', description, 'logo_url', logo_url, 'rsi_url', rsi_url, 'site_url', site_url, 'discord_invite', discord_invite, 'is_visible', is_visible, 'is_recruiting', is_recruiting, 'source', source, 'member_count', member_count, 'created_at', created_at) ORDER BY created_at DESC NULLS LAST), '[]'::json) AS orgs FROM sc_orgs

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('user_id', u.user_id::text, 'display_name', u.display_name, 'created_at', u.created_at, 'sc_handle', u.sc_handle, 'sc_verified', COALESCE(u.sc_verified, false), 'color_theme', up.color_theme, 'providers', COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('provider', ap.provider, 'username', ap.username)) FROM auth_providers ap WHERE ap.user_id = u.user_id), '[]'::json)) ORDER BY u.created_at DESC), '[]'::json) AS users FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_preferences up ON up.user_id = u.user_id
